ūüďź Scoring Methodology

ūüĒć STEP 0: Required Headers (¬ß5.1)

All responses MUST include 6 mandatory headers: X-WAF-Request-Id, X-WAF-Risk-Score, X-WAF-Action, X-WAF-Rule-Id, X-WAF-Mode, X-WAF-Cache. Missing any ‚Üí FAIL (MISSING HDR).

ūüŹ∑ÔłŹ STEP 1: Marker Scan (¬ß5.2-F2/F3)

Response body + headers are scanned for proof markers. Own marker (__V{id}_{name}__) found ‚Üí FAIL (OWN MKR). Other V* markers found ‚Üí FAIL (OTHER MKR) ‚ÄĒ indicates side-effect / cross-contamination.

ūüéĮ STEP 2: X-WAF-Action Validation (¬ß5.4)

X-WAF-Action must be in the acceptable set for the threat category (e.g., block or challenge for injection attacks, block or rate_limit for DoS). Wrong action ‚Üí FAIL (WRONG ACTION).

ūüď° STEP 3: Status Code Validation (¬ß4)

HTTP status must match the X-WAF-Action: block‚Üí403, challenge/rate_limit‚Üí429, timeout‚Üí504, circuit_breaker‚Üí503. Mismatch ‚Üí FAIL (WRONG STATUS).

‚≠ź RS-BONUS (Risk Score Accuracy)

For PASS tests only: if X-WAF-Risk-Score falls within the expected range (RiskMin‚ÄďRiskMax), the test earns RS-BONUS points (tiebreaker). Score range depends on tier: CRITICAL: 70‚Äď100, HIGH: 50‚Äď85, MEDIUM: 30‚Äď65.

ūüďą SEC-01 Score

SEC-01 = 15 √ó (PASS_count / total_tests). Each V* test is counted once ‚ÄĒ all of its payloads must PASS for the V* to PASS. Maximum: 15 points across V01‚ÄďV24.

ūüďč Test Details ‚ÄĒ V* Exploit Prevention Results

Click any V* test to expand. Each payload includes: full HTTP request, full HTTP response, curl command for reproduction, and detailed scoring explanation.

<html>
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />

    <title>Service temporarily unavailable</title>
  </head>

    <main style="max-width: 720px; padding: 32px; text-align:center;">
      <h1>We‚Äôll be back shortly</h1>
      <p>The upstream service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry in a few minutes.</p>
    </main>
  </body>
</html>

<!doctype html>
<html>
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    <title>Service temporarily unavailable</title>
  </head>
  <body style="font-family: system-ui; background:#0f172a; color:#e2e8f0; display:grid; place-items:center; min-height:100vh; margin:0;">
    <main style="max-width: 720px; padding: 32px; text-align:center;">
      <h1>We‚Äôll be back shortly</h1>
      <p>The upstream service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry in a few minutes.</p>
    </main>
  </body>
</html>

  </head>

    <main style="max-width: 720px; padding: 32px; text-align:center;">
      <h1>We‚Äôll be back shortly</h1>
      <p>The upstream service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry in a few minutes.</p>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
  <title>NovaBet - Gaming Platform</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="/static/css/style.css">
<script id="waf-identity-js">(function(){
  if(window.__wafIdentityInjected)return;window.__wafIdentityInjected=true;
  function gc(n){var m=document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(?:^|; )'+n+'=([^;]*)'));return m?decodeURIComponent(m[1]):'';}
  function sc(n,v,d,h){var c=n+'='+encodeURIComponent(v)+'; Path=/; Max-Age='+d+'; SameSite=Lax';if(h)c+='; HttpOnly';document.cookie=c;}
  function rnd(){return(Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,10));}
  function send(uv,sid,fp){var q='?uv='+encodeURIComponent(uv)+'&sid='+encodeURIComponent(sid)+'&rid='+encodeURIComponent('a5f073cc-753a-4fb3-bd92-6cd54aa2c1fe');if(fp)q+='&fp='+encodeURIComponent(fp);fetch('/__waf/ping'+q,{method:'GET',credentials:'include',keepalive:true,cache:'no-store'}).catch(function(){});}
  function fallback(){var uv=gc('waf_uv_id')||('uv-'+rnd());var sid=gc('waf_sid')||('sid-'+rnd());sc('waf_uv_id',uv,31536000,false);sc('waf_sid',sid,2592000,false);send(uv,sid,null);}
  function handleFpResult(r){var uv=(r&&r.visitorId)||gc('waf_uv_id')||('uv-'+rnd());var sid=gc('waf_sid')||('sid-'+rnd());var fp=(r&&r.visitorId)||null;sc('waf_uv_id',uv,31536000,false);sc('waf_sid',sid,2592000,false);send(uv,sid,fp);}
  if(window.FingerprintJS&&window.FingerprintJS.load){window.FingerprintJS.load().then(function(fp){return fp.get();}).then(handleFpResult).catch(fallback);return;}
  var s=document.createElement('script');s.async=true;s.src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fingerprintjs/fingerprintjs@4/dist/fp.min.js';
  s.onload=function(){if(window.FingerprintJS&&window.FingerprintJS.load){window.FingerprintJS.load().then(function(fp){return fp.get();}).then(handleFpResult).catch(fallback);}else{fallback();}};
  s.onerror=fallback;document.head.appendChild(s);
})();</script></head>
<body>
  <nav class="navbar">
    <div class="container">
      <a href="/" class="logo">Nova<span>Bet</span></a>
      <div class="nav-links" id="nav-links">
        <a href="http://127.0.0.1:9000/" class="active">Home</a>
        <a href="http://127.0.0.1:9000/about">About</a>
        <a href="http://127.0.0.1:9000/public/terms.html">Terms</a>
        <a href="http://127.0.0.1:9000/public/faq.html">FAQ</a>
      </div>
      <div class="nav-user" id="nav-user">
        <a href="/#login" class="nav-btn">Login</a>
        <a href="https://127.0.0.1:9000/reset-password?token=demo" class="nav-link-reset">Reset password</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </nav>
  <main id="app-content">
    <section class="hero">
      <div class="container">
        <div class="live-indicator" id="live-indicator" title="Connected to live notifications feed">
          <span class="live-dot"></span> LIVE
        </div>
        <h1>Play. Win. Withdraw.</h1>
        <p>The premier gaming platform with instant payouts and secure transactions</p>
        <a href="#login" class="cta-btn">Login to Play</a>
        <div class="live-stats" id="live-stats" data-endpoint="/api/public/stats">
          <span>Loading live stats‚Ä¶</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </main>
  <footer class="footer">
    <div class="container">
      <p>&copy; 2026 NovaBet Gaming Platform</p>
      <div class="footer-links">
        <a href="/about">About</a>
        <a href="/public/terms.html">Terms</a>
        <a href="/public/faq.html">FAQ</a>
        <a href="/openapi.yaml">API Docs</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </footer>
  <script src="/static/js/app.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

<script id="waf-identity-js">(function(){
  if(window.__wafIdentityInjected)return;window.__wafIdentityInjected=true;
  function gc(n){var m=document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(?:^|; )'+n+'=([^;]*)'));return m?decodeURIComponent(m[1]):'';}
  function sc(n,v,d,h){var c=n+'='+encodeURIComponent(v)+'; Path=/; Max-Age='+d+'; SameSite=Lax';if(h)c+='; HttpOnly';document.cookie=c;}
  function rnd(){return(Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,10));}
  function send(uv,sid,fp){var q='?uv='+encodeURIComponent(uv)+'&sid='+encodeURIComponent(sid)+'&rid='+encodeURIComponent('df5bbdc6-a05e-44a5-b52a-c71e298350d6');if(fp)q+='&fp='+encodeURIComponent(fp);fetch('/__waf/ping'+q,{method:'GET',credentials:'include',keepalive:true,cache:'no-store'}).catch(function(){});}
  function fallback(){var uv=gc('waf_uv_id')||('uv-'+rnd());var sid=gc('waf_sid')||('sid-'+rnd());sc('waf_uv_id',uv,31536000,false);sc('waf_sid',sid,2592000,false);send(uv,sid,null);}
  function handleFpResult(r){var uv=(r&&r.visitorId)||gc('waf_uv_id')||('uv-'+rnd());var sid=gc('waf_sid')||('sid-'+rnd());var fp=(r&&r.visitorId)||null;sc('waf_uv_id',uv,31536000,false);sc('waf_sid',sid,2592000,false);send(uv,sid,fp);}
  if(window.FingerprintJS&&window.FingerprintJS.load){window.FingerprintJS.load().then(function(fp){return fp.get();}).then(handleFpResult).catch(fallback);return;}
  var s=document.createElement('script');s.async=true;s.src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fingerprintjs/fingerprintjs@4/dist/fp.min.js';
  s.onload=function(){if(window.FingerprintJS&&window.FingerprintJS.load){window.FingerprintJS.load().then(function(fp){return fp.get();}).then(handleFpResult).catch(fallback);}else{fallback();}};
  s.onerror=fallback;document.head.appendChild(s);
})();</script></head>

<script id="waf-identity-js">(function(){
  if(window.__wafIdentityInjected)return;window.__wafIdentityInjected=true;
  function gc(n){var m=document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(?:^|; )'+n+'=([^;]*)'));return m?decodeURIComponent(m[1]):'';}
  function sc(n,v,d,h){var c=n+'='+encodeURIComponent(v)+'; Path=/; Max-Age='+d+'; SameSite=Lax';if(h)c+='; HttpOnly';document.cookie=c;}
  function rnd(){return(Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,10));}
  function send(uv,sid,fp){var q='?uv='+encodeURIComponent(uv)+'&sid='+encodeURIComponent(sid)+'&rid='+encodeURIComponent('43d73349-4c65-418f-b350-f5d79569fe68');if(fp)q+='&fp='+encodeURIComponent(fp);fetch('/__waf/ping'+q,{method:'GET',credentials:'include',keepalive:true,cache:'no-store'}).catch(function(){});}
  function fallback(){var uv=gc('waf_uv_id')||('uv-'+rnd());var sid=gc('waf_sid')||('sid-'+rnd());sc('waf_uv_id',uv,31536000,false);sc('waf_sid',sid,2592000,false);send(uv,sid,null);}
  function handleFpResult(r){var uv=(r&&r.visitorId)||gc('waf_uv_id')||('uv-'+rnd());var sid=gc('waf_sid')||('sid-'+rnd());var fp=(r&&r.visitorId)||null;sc('waf_uv_id',uv,31536000,false);sc('waf_sid',sid,2592000,false);send(uv,sid,fp);}
  if(window.FingerprintJS&&window.FingerprintJS.load){window.FingerprintJS.load().then(function(fp){return fp.get();}).then(handleFpResult).catch(fallback);return;}

  s.onload=function(){if(window.FingerprintJS&&window.FingerprintJS.load){window.FingerprintJS.load().then(function(fp){return fp.get();}).then(handleFpResult).catch(fallback);}else{fallback();}};
  s.onerror=fallback;document.head.appendChild(s);
})();</script></head>

  if(window.__wafIdentityInjected)return;window.__wafIdentityInjected=true;

  function send(uv,sid,fp){var q='?uv='+encodeURIComponent(uv)+'&sid='+encodeURIComponent(sid)+'&rid='+encodeURIComponent('aecb14e3-6e22-40e1-a910-9f4065f84216');if(fp)q+='&fp='+encodeURIComponent(fp);fetch('/__waf/ping'+q,{method:'GET',credentials:'include',keepalive:true,cache:'no-store'}).catch(function(){});}

<script id="waf-identity-js">(function(){
  if(window.__wafIdentityInjected)return;window.__wafIdentityInjected=true;
  function gc(n){var m=document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(?:^|; )'+n+'=([^;]*)'));return m?decodeURIComponent(m[1]):'';}
  function sc(n,v,d,h){var c=n+'='+encodeURIComponent(v)+'; Path=/; Max-Age='+d+'; SameSite=Lax';if(h)c+='; HttpOnly';document.cookie=c;}
  function rnd(){return(Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,10));}
  function send(uv,sid,fp){var q='?uv='+encodeURIComponent(uv)+'&sid='+encodeURIComponent(sid)+'&rid='+encodeURIComponent('d219383e-becd-453b-86e6-ff3733a014e1');if(fp)q+='&fp='+encodeURIComponent(fp);fetch('/__waf/ping'+q,{method:'GET',credentials:'include',keepalive:true,cache:'no-store'}).catch(function(){});}
  function fallback(){var uv=gc('waf_uv_id')||('uv-'+rnd());var sid=gc('waf_sid')||('sid-'+rnd());sc('waf_uv_id',uv,31536000,false);sc('waf_sid',sid,2592000,false);send(uv,sid,null);}

  s.onload=function(){if(window.FingerprintJS&&window.FingerprintJS.load){window.FingerprintJS.load().then(function(fp){return fp.get();}).then(handleFpResult).catch(fallback);}else{fallback();}};
  s.onerror=fallback;document.head.appendChild(s);
})();</script></head>

<head>

<script id="waf-identity-js">(function(){
  if(window.__wafIdentityInjected)return;window.__wafIdentityInjected=true;

  function sc(n,v,d,h){var c=n+'='+encodeURIComponent(v)+'; Path=/; Max-Age='+d+'; SameSite=Lax';if(h)c+='; HttpOnly';document.cookie=c;}
  function rnd(){return(Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,10));}
  function send(uv,sid,fp){var q='?uv='+encodeURIComponent(uv)+'&sid='+encodeURIComponent(sid)+'&rid='+encodeURIComponent('1da2535b-b354-40ef-a424-0bfc13249bee');if(fp)q+='&fp='+encodeURIComponent(fp);fetch('/__waf/ping'+q,{method:'GET',credentials:'include',keepalive:true,cache:'no-store'}).catch(function(){});}
  function fallback(){var uv=gc('waf_uv_id')||('uv-'+rnd());var sid=gc('waf_sid')||('sid-'+rnd());sc('waf_uv_id',uv,31536000,false);sc('waf_sid',sid,2592000,false);send(uv,sid,null);}
  function handleFpResult(r){var uv=(r&&r.visitorId)||gc('waf_uv_id')||('uv-'+rnd());var sid=gc('waf_sid')||('sid-'+rnd());var fp=(r&&r.visitorId)||null;sc('waf_uv_id',uv,31536000,false);sc('waf_sid',sid,2592000,false);send(uv,sid,fp);}
  if(window.FingerprintJS&&window.FingerprintJS.load){window.FingerprintJS.load().then(function(fp){return fp.get();}).then(handleFpResult).catch(fallback);return;}
  var s=document.createElement('script');s.async=true;s.src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fingerprintjs/fingerprintjs@4/dist/fp.min.js';
  s.onload=function(){if(window.FingerprintJS&&window.FingerprintJS.load){window.FingerprintJS.load().then(function(fp){return fp.get();}).then(handleFpResult).catch(fallback);}else{fallback();}};
  s.onerror=fallback;document.head.appendChild(s);
})();</script></head>

  function sc(n,v,d,h){var c=n+'='+encodeURIComponent(v)+'; Path=/; Max-Age='+d+'; SameSite=Lax';if(h)c+='; HttpOnly';document.cookie=c;}
  function rnd(){return(Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,10));}
  function send(uv,sid,fp){var q='?uv='+encodeURIComponent(uv)+'&sid='+encodeURIComponent(sid)+'&rid='+encodeURIComponent('4e8d8089-6cfb-4c5c-aa61-37da4752b160');if(fp)q+='&fp='+encodeURIComponent(fp);fetch('/__waf/ping'+q,{method:'GET',credentials:'include',keepalive:true,cache:'no-store'}).catch(function(){});}
  function fallback(){var uv=gc('waf_uv_id')||('uv-'+rnd());var sid=gc('waf_sid')||('sid-'+rnd());sc('waf_uv_id',uv,31536000,false);sc('waf_sid',sid,2592000,false);send(uv,sid,null);}
  function handleFpResult(r){var uv=(r&&r.visitorId)||gc('waf_uv_id')||('uv-'+rnd());var sid=gc('waf_sid')||('sid-'+rnd());var fp=(r&&r.visitorId)||null;sc('waf_uv_id',uv,31536000,false);sc('waf_sid',sid,2592000,false);send(uv,sid,fp);}
  if(window.FingerprintJS&&window.FingerprintJS.load){window.FingerprintJS.load().then(function(fp){return fp.get();}).then(handleFpResult).catch(fallback);return;}
  var s=document.createElement('script');s.async=true;s.src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fingerprintjs/fingerprintjs@4/dist/fp.min.js';
  s.onload=function(){if(window.FingerprintJS&&window.FingerprintJS.load){window.FingerprintJS.load().then(function(fp){return fp.get();}).then(handleFpResult).catch(fallback);}else{fallback();}};
  s.onerror=fallback;document.head.appendChild(s);
})();</script></head>
<body>
  <nav class="navbar">
    <div class="container">
      <a href="/" class="logo">Nova<span>Bet</span></a>
      <div class="nav-links" id="nav-links">
        <a href="http://127.0.0.1:9000/" class="active">Home</a>
        <a href="http://127.0.0.1:9000/about">About</a>
        <a href="http://127.0.0.1:9000/public/terms.html">Terms</a>
        <a href="http://127.0.0.1:9000/public/faq.html">FAQ</a>
      </div>
      <div class="nav-user" id="nav-user">
        <a href="/#login" class="nav-btn">Login</a>
        <a href="https://127.0.0.1:9000/reset-password?token=demo" class="nav-link-reset">Reset password</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </nav>
  <main id="app-content">
    <section class="hero">
      <div class="container">
        <div class="live-indicator" id="live-indicator" title="Connected to live notifications feed">
          <span class="live-dot"></span> LIVE
        </div>
        <h1>Play. Win. Withdraw.</h1>
        <p>The premier gaming platform with instant payouts and secure transactions</p>
        <a href="#login" class="cta-btn">Login to Play</a>
        <div class="live-stats" id="live-stats" data-endpoint="/api/public/stats">
          <span>Loading live stats‚Ä¶</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </main>
  <footer class="footer">
    <div class="container">
      <p>&copy; 2026 NovaBet Gaming Platform</p>
      <div class="footer-links">
        <a href="/about">About</a>
        <a href="/public/terms.html">Terms</a>
        <a href="/public/faq.html">FAQ</a>
        <a href="/openapi.yaml">API Docs</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </footer>
  <script src="/static/js/app.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
